title: NEGG Earnings History and Forecast - Historical Data and Performance Trends
text:
Newegg Commerce (NEGG) Earnings History and Forecasts Analysis.

Historical Earnings Performance: The company has experienced significant earnings challenges over the past several years, with declining EPS metrics indicating a path to profitability that has been delayed multiple times.

FY2025 Results (Reported April 28, 2026): EPS: -$0.23 (vs prior year -$2.25). Revenue: $1.44B (vs prior year $1.24B, +16.9% growth).

FY2024 Results: EPS: -$3.20. Revenue: $1.50B.

FY2023 Results: EPS: -$3.00. Revenue: $1.72B.

Trend Analysis: While earnings per share have improved significantly in FY2025, the company remains unprofitable. However, the direction of improvement is positive with EPS losses narrowing and revenue stabilizing after declines in prior years. The path to profitability visible in adjusted EBITDA metrics ($24.8M in FY2025) suggests bottom-line profitability may be achievable in FY2026.

2026 Earnings Forecast: Management guidance for 2026 includes net income of $6.1M to $15.7M, representing a potential return to profitability for the first time in multiple years. This is a critical catalyst for investors.

Key Metrics to Monitor: Quarterly earnings progression toward the full-year 2026 targets. Sustainability of gross margins above 11%. Revenue growth trends relative to 2026 guidance of $1.23B-$1.47B.
